tagline: Clear applied filters individually: Dashboard viewers can now individually clear applied filters from the active selection bar.
what_it_does: Clear applied filters individually: Dashboard viewers can now individually clear applied filters from the active selection bar. Text box vertical alignment: Text box widgets now support vertical alignment (top, center, and bottom). Choropleth map boundaries: Choropleth maps now support additional boundary types, including ZIP code and NUTS regions.
why_it_matters: Waterfall chart total bar visibility: The waterfall chart editor now hides the total bar toggle when the x axis configuration doesn't support it, reducing authoring confusion.
key_takeaway: Clear applied filters individually: Dashboard viewers can now individually clear applied filters from the active selection bar.
